sec1_desc: Explore and establish campus imaging standards. By organizing pre-production parameters and post-production archiving standards, we aim to provide a stable technical reference and workflow guarantee for every high-quality visual recording.
sec2_desc: Through professional technical service capabilities, we establish collaborative mechanisms with multiple student organizations on campus, providing a comprehensive visual support network for complex campus events.
sec3_desc: With 5 years of campus photography service experience, we have accumulated rich standard documents and practical resources. We open source some of these resources for reference by other organizations on and off campus, working together to promote campus visual culture.
news_desc: Insights into global imaging technology frontiers and industry trends
cta_desc: Whether you are a photographer, editor, or visual creator, we look forward to working with you to define the future of campus imagery.
recruiting_page_subtitle: We welcome passionate and creative individuals to join KSVG and its partners. Here you will find the latest recruitment opportunities.
partners_page_subtitle: We are grateful to collaborate with the following organizations, both on and off campus, to advance visual media development
resources_page_subtitle: Browse and download high-quality campus影像 materials and standardized resources
resources_unavailable_desc: We are organizing resource materials. Please check back later.
articles_page_subtitle: Explore the latest news, official releases, and high-quality影像 records
articles_unavailable_desc: We are working hard to improve the content. Please check back later.
partner_bkc_desc: A student-run campus financial institution offering innovative financial education and service experiences
partner_kcsc_desc: The core department responsible for external liaison and image promotion of the KCIS Student Council
partner_kcva_desc: KCVA — Kang Chiao Volleyball League, promoting campus volleyball development, organizing intramural leagues and inter-school exchanges
footer_a11y: This website is designed in accordance with USWDS and ADA standards to ensure accessible digital experiences for all users.
